belier.author: Sibylle
belier.intro: Aries, this solar Sunday offers you a quieter playground than your nature usually demands. The Sun in Taurus invites your martial fire to express itself through simple, well placed acts. You can turn this day into a workshop of joyful patience rather than a race against the clock.
belier.love: In a couple, a slow shared walk is worth more than a packed schedule that would exhaust your Sunday. A soft word spoken without rush can warm a tender zone you had left in suspense. Single, you have the chance to let a recent encounter breathe before giving it a direction.
belier.work: If you choose to advance a project today, focus on a single precise task rather than a long sprawling list. An idea jotted down at dawn will take shape in the morning calm and serve you on Monday. Save your fervor for the week, today's rest is no weakness.
belier.energy: Direct energy that gains by being channeled through slow, conscious gestures. A quiet jog or a bit of gardening recharges you better than an intense effort this Sunday.
belier.intuition: A small voice suggests you forgive a detail that weighed on you for no real reason. Listen to it, this is your fire learning to become an ember.
belier.mantra: I turn my drive into calm presence.

taureau.author: Sibylle
taureau.intro: Taurus, the Sun keeps bathing your sign and holds you in a season of quiet fullness. Venus, your guardian, sharpens your taste for simple beauty and you can savor this Sunday like a ripe fruit. Attention paid to a sensory pleasure becomes a kind of soft prayer.
taureau.love: Love today listens through shared silence more than through loud declarations. In a couple, a meal cooked together, no phones, revives an intimacy the week sometimes nibbles away. Single, your reassuring presence draws a gaze that seeks depth rather than fanfare.
taureau.work: You can use the Sunday calm to clarify a precise intention for the days ahead. A practical idea reaches you while walking or cooking, capture it before it fades into the everyday. Your sense of the concrete is your best ally today.
taureau.energy: Full and grounded energy that loves supple movements and long conscious breaths. A walk in nature or a stretching session fulfills you better than a brutal cardio effort.
taureau.intuition: Your senses are fine antennas this Sunday, listen to what they signal. A scent or a texture brings you back to a memory worth gently revisiting.
taureau.mantra: I savor my season as a quiet offering.

gemeaux.author: Sibylle
gemeaux.intro: Gemini, your mind sparkles with images and words, but this Taurean Sunday invites you to choose one thought and deepen it. Mercury gives you flexibility, and the Sun asks for steadiness. You can turn focus into a game rather than a stern constraint.
gemeaux.love: A long conversation with your partner could uncover a nuance never named before. In a couple, dare the simple question rather than the complex analysis and listen to the answer all the way through. Single, a written exchange takes on new warmth if you accept to slow the tempo.
gemeaux.work: If you work today, sort your notes rather than producing in a rush. This tidying prepares a much smoother week and frees you from small accumulated tensions. A short, targeted reading will give you more than a long evening of browsing.
gemeaux.energy: Airy energy, sometimes a bit fluttering, that settles through conscious breathing. A slow walk or a gentle yoga session helps you center this mental flow.
gemeaux.intuition: A word caught in passing could answer a silent question you have been carrying for a few days. Note it down, its meaning will sharpen soon.
gemeaux.mantra: I choose one idea and I cultivate it.

cancer.author: Sibylle
cancer.intro: Cancer, the Moon wraps you in a particular softness on this restful Sunday. Your emotions become quiet tides you can observe without fear or urgency to act. You have the chance to build a cocoon where tenderness flows freely, expecting nothing in return.
cancer.love: Home is your most fertile ground today, take care of it with a soft intention. In a couple, a calm brunch or a movie curled on the couch are worth all the prestigious outings. Single, a call to a loved one could move you more than you imagined while dialing.
cancer.work: If you must think about the week, do it from a serene place, never under pressure. Your intuition is finer than pure logic, and a decision made in the morning calm will be just. Protect your creative bubble like one protects a precious ember.
cancer.energy: Tender energy, sometimes a little slow, that asks for rest without the slightest guilt. A long bath or a luminous nap recharges you better than active sport.
cancer.intuition: A dream from the night holds its echo through the day and deserves gentle attention. Note what remains before the colors fade in the everyday.
cancer.mantra: I welcome my tides with infinite softness.

lion.author: Sibylle
lion.intro: Leo, this Sunday is your solar day, and the Sun in Taurus invites you to embody your nobility differently today. Your radiance gains by becoming quieter and more rooted in the concrete. You can show your strength through the quality of a presence rather than the brilliance of a gesture.
lion.love: Grand spectacle is not needed today to make a heart vibrate. In a couple, a sincere word whispered in the ear touches more than a flamboyant prepared declaration. Single, your calm presence draws gazes deeper than usual.
lion.work: A long idea ripens in the background of your day and you can put it on paper without forcing it. An expected recognition could appear in a muted way, receive it with grace. Your authority feeds today on patience rather than panache.
lion.energy: Solar but soft energy, ideal for a sustained effort without dramatic excess. An activity in the open air balances your natural need for movement and light.
lion.intuition: Your heart knows before your reason what truly honors you over time. Follow that clear beat when you hesitate between two close options.
lion.mantra: I shine through the quality of my presence.

vierge.author: Sibylle
vierge.intro: Virgo, this Taurean Sunday resonates with your love of earth and well crafted concrete things. Mercury gives you precision, and the Sun reminds you to embody it with suppleness rather than rigor. You can turn a modest task into an almost meditative and soothing act.
vierge.love: Tenderness shows itself today through precise, almost artisanal attentions. In a couple, a practical gesture offered without being asked speaks of your love eloquently. Single, your fineness of observation lets you notice a revealing detail in someone recently met.
vierge.work: Use the weekend to bring order to a folder or a corner of your desk that weighed on your mind. This physical clarity will light your decisions for the coming week far more than a long reflection. A concrete improvement emerges naturally as you sort.
vierge.energy: Settled energy, suited to walking and slow precise gestures. Gardening or active tidying relaxes you more than an intense fitness session.
vierge.intuition: Your body signals the right priorities through small tensions or quiet eases. Learn to read these signals as a reliable, kind compass.
vierge.mantra: I bring order with tenderness and precision.

balance.author: Sibylle
balance.intro: Libra, Venus, your ruling planet, lights this Sunday with a particular grace. The Sun in Taurus underlines your taste for tangible harmony and the simple beauties of the everyday. You can beautify your environment with one small gesture and feel the air breathe better at once.
balance.love: Romantic balance passes through one fair word said at the right moment, neither too early nor too late. In a couple, a sincere compliment about a discreet detail warms complicity like an ember. Single, a cultural or artistic outing places you on the path of an interesting encounter.
balance.work: A folder that asks for diplomacy suits you particularly well today, even on a Sunday. You can find the right words to ease a latent tension between two people you know. A partnership takes shape in a relaxed conversation.
balance.energy: Graceful and harmonious energy that loves soft movements and fluid rhythms. Dance, tai chi or a simple elegant walk deeply restore you.
balance.intuition: Your aesthetic sense is also a deep intuition about what truly suits you. If a scene or a color moves you strongly, it is speaking to you of something else.
balance.mantra: I weave harmony around me with grace.

scorpion.author: Sibylle
scorpion.intro: Scorpio, the full Taurean season places you opposite your sign and that is precisely where your path of growth reveals itself. Pluto asks you to transform raw intensity into peaceful depth. You can choose soft lucidity rather than inner storm.
scorpion.love: Your attachments today ask for a tender honesty, without harshness toward the other or yourself. In a couple, a truth said gently opens a new level of shared intimacy. Single, a prolonged gaze could seal a beginning you will remember for a long time.
scorpion.work: A long strategy clarifies in your mind, without noise or visible haste. You have the chance to advance your key piece in silence, sheltered from outside eyes. Keep your intentions to yourself for a few more days.
scorpion.energy: Dense and deep energy that loves efforts which last and which transform. A long walk or a water session channels you better than explosive sport today.
scorpion.intuition: Your radars are particularly fine on this restful Sunday. What you sense about a person is probably right, trust yourself without overinterpreting every signal.
scorpion.mantra: I turn my intensity into kind lucidity.

sagittaire.author: Sibylle
sagittaire.intro: Sagittarius, your Jovian fire reaches for the horizon, but this Taurean Sunday invites you to explore the one beneath your feet. Jupiter tells you there is also adventure in the familiar revisited with fresh eyes. You can discover your own neighborhood like a curious and grateful traveler.
sagittaire.love: Spontaneity remains your charm, but today it gains by pausing for a moment. In a couple, an improvised but short escape renews your shared spark without unsettling the body. Single, a sincere conversation with a new face could win you over for a long time.
sagittaire.work: An opportunity from afar grows clearer in a written exchange or a reading. Reply with enthusiasm but also with precision on the concrete terms expected. Your optimism attracts good news when it pairs with joyful rigor.
sagittaire.energy: Lively and joyful energy, perfect for an outdoor activity in motion. A hike, even a brief one, fills you with frank and lasting joy.
sagittaire.intuition: A reading or a scene seen speaks to you of a possible and desirable future. Note the image that struck you, it will return to guide you at the right moment.
sagittaire.mantra: I explore the hidden adventure in the familiar.

capricorne.author: Sibylle
capricorne.intro: Capricorn, the Taurean Sun reinforces your natural ground of choice and gives you a fully livable Sunday. Saturn, your master, appreciates this posture where patience becomes comfort rather than constraint. You can lay clear foundations for the week ahead, with no haste at all.
capricorne.love: You need no words to express deep, faithful attachment today. In a couple, a reliable and silent presence reassures more than any prepared speech. Single, your elegant sobriety intrigues more than you really imagine.
capricorne.work: A long view of your path takes shape in the background of your quiet day. You can put it down in a few lines to keep it vivid and accessible. An administrative detail handled today frees you for larger projects.
capricorne.energy: Enduring and stable energy, ideal for a methodical activity sustained over time. A long walk in nature, real or symbolic, restores you deeply.
capricorne.intuition: Your common sense is your most reliable and most earthly form of intuition. If something seems reasonable and right, it is probably the good path.
capricorne.mantra: I build with patience and clarity.

verseau.author: Sibylle
verseau.intro: Aquarius, your Uranian sky brushes against the Taurean Sun and asks you to make one of your most airy ideas concrete. You can turn an original intuition into a tangible gesture today. Novelty gains by being embodied to truly exist in the world.
verseau.love: You appreciate today a freedom that does not exclude tenderness shared with sincerity. In a couple, an activity shared outside your routine revives mutual curiosity. Single, an encounter in an associative or activist setting could move you deeply.
verseau.work: An innovative idea deserves to be noted and presented to the right person on Monday. Today, refine its wording so it is grasped quickly and well. An unexpected colleague could become a precious ally in the weeks ahead.
verseau.energy: Lively and slightly electric energy that asks to be intelligently channeled by movement. A light team sport or a creative activity relaxes you better than a solo session.
verseau.intuition: Your intuitive flashes arrive at the most unexpected moments of the day. Keep a notebook within reach so as not to lose those fleeting sparks.
verseau.mantra: I give body to my flashes of ideas.

poissons.author: Sibylle
poissons.intro: Pisces, Neptune bathes you in tender reverie on this spring Sunday in May. The Taurean Sun offers you a frame where your imagination can settle without dissolving into vagueness. You can give shape to a dream through a simple, embodied artistic gesture today.
poissons.love: Your sensitivity catches the most subtle nuances of the other this Sunday. In a couple, listen to what is not said, that is often where the unspoken essential lives. Single, a sudden attraction could surface in a place charged with art or music.
poissons.work: You can let your intuition guide the soft organization of your coming week. A creative project deserves a few hours of care without interruption or numerical constraint. Avoid purely accounting decisions made in haste today.
poissons.energy: Soft and dreamy energy, in natural harmony with water and music. A swim, a bath or a meditation session recharges you more than an intense effort.
poissons.intuition: Your dreams and mental images are particularly eloquent today. Note them before they evaporate into the concrete of the flowing day.
poissons.mantra: I give shape to my most tender dreams.
